overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit urban street with Japanese architectural elements, under elevated highways, and past various commercial establishments on a sunny day.

events.description: character passes NPC standing near fire barrel on the right

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in purple top walking away from camera

wooden food stall with menu board and serving window

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow covered alleyway with traditional red paper lanterns hanging overhead. The character walks forward past a ramen shop on the right and green neon lighting on the left, encountering an NPC standing near a fire barrel.

scene_state.functional_zone: street under elevated highway with cafes

events.description: exits narrow alley into wider street under highway overpass
futuristic black vehicle drives past on the road to the left

agents.ego_description: continuing along sidewalk passing by storefronts and vehicles

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car driving past on the road

entered.detail: vertical sign with yellow and red lettering reading KUTSURAGI CAFE
massive concrete elevated highway structure overhead
yellow metal barrier separating sidewalk from road

segments.scene_description: The character exits the narrow alley into a wider street beneath a massive highway overpass. The Kutsuragi Cafe is visible on the right with its neon open sign, while futuristic vehicles pass by on the road to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street under elevated highway with digital billboards

events.description: slight curve to the right as the street bends
approaching intersection with large neon signage overhead

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass with large digital billboards visible overhead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in the distance under the overpass

entered.detail: large screen displaying advertisements on the left wall
circular neon sign with ramen bowl icon and Japanese text
multi-story building with green facade and air conditioning units

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the massive highway overpass, the character moves through a wide commercial street lined with digital billboards. A large neon ramen sign hangs overhead as the street curves toward an intersection.

events.description: character turns right at the intersection
NCPD police vehicle parked near construction barriers

agents.ego_description: turning right at the intersection and continuing down the street past storefronts

notable_agents.action: NCPD police SUV parked near construction barriers

entered.detail: green storefront with CORAL signage and steam vents
pink neon sign shaped like lips
blue neon sign shaped like a bullet or capsule
black police SUV with NCPD markings
red and white striped concrete barriers blocking road access

segments.scene_description: The character turns right at a busy intersection filled with vibrant neon signs including a large pink lips sign and blue bullet sign. The Coral shop is visible on the right while an NCPD police vehicle sits parked near construction barriers on the left.

events.description: entering darker underpass area with construction debris

agents.ego_description: walking past construction barriers toward the darker underpass area

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt walking toward camera

entered.detail: derelict white and orange van with open doors
stacked concrete blocks blocking the road
green industrial dumpsters with trash bags

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking into a darker, more industrial area under the highway overpass. Construction barriers, an abandoned van, and trash dumpsters line the path as the environment becomes more derelict and shadowy.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, traditional alleyway into a sprawling neon commercial district that eventually descends into a derelict industrial zone. It begins in a narrow covered passage adorned with red paper lanterns, moving past a ramen shop and green neon lights toward a figure by a fire barrel. As the character exits the alley, the space opens up beneath a massive highway overpass where the Kutsuragi Cafe and passing futuristic vehicles appear, before the path expands further into a wide street lined with digital billboards and a large neon ramen sign. The scene then shifts at a busy intersection filled with vivid pink and blue signage and a parked NCPD vehicle, turning right past the Coral shop. Finally, the environment transitions from the bright commercial hub into a darker, shadowy area under the overpass, characterized by construction barriers, an abandoned van, and trash dumpsters.
